name: The Nine Banners
core_claim: War is the test of oath, courage, command and memory.

name: The Measure of Roads
core_claim: Civilization exists because violence is measured by law, roads and grain.

name: The Hearth Below
core_claim: The living hold land and names in trust for the dead.

name: The Salt Witness
core_claim: Life survives by measured scarcity and honest exchange.

name: The Bell of Return
core_claim: The sea records every debt, body and broken voyage.

name: The Long Account
core_claim: No act ends with one lifetime; obligations outlive the actor.

name: The Inner Stone
core_claim: A society is only as true as the oaths it can maintain under pressure.
